texto: Life is not a matter for simple optimism--for there is evil
autor: nor for mere pessimism--for there is good. The possibility for good in the face of evil is what gives life tragic meaning.
explicacao: Citação de nor for mere pessimism--for there is good. The possibility for good in the face of evil is what gives life tragic meaning. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Life is not a matter for simple optimism--for there is evil” articula reflexao, rollo-may, the-art-of-counseling em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como the-art-of-counseling.
